sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, value INTEGER, created_at DATE);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 5, DATE '2023-01-01'), (2, NULL, DATE '2023-01-02'), (3, 0, DATE '2023-01-03');
CREATE TABLE reference_table (ref_id INTEGER, ref_value INTEGER);
SELECT id, bit_or(value) AS bitwise_or_value FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING bitwise_or_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT t.id, bit_or(t.value) FROM test_table t JOIN reference_table r ON t.id = r.ref_id GROUP BY t.id;
SELECT t1.id, bit_or(t1.value) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.created_at) FROM test_table t1 WHERE t1.value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY t1.created_at;
SELECT r.ref_id, bit_or(COALESCE(t.value, 0)) AS or_value FROM reference_table r LEFT JOIN test_table t ON r.ref_id = t.id GROUP BY r.ref_id;
SELECT (DATE '2023-01-01' - INTERVAL 5 DAY) AS five_days_ago, bit_or(value) FROM test_table WHERE created_at > (DATE '2023-01-01' - INTERVAL 10 DAY) GROUP BY five_days_ago;
SELECT bit_or(value) AS or_value, (DATE '2023-01-01' - INTERVAL (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table) DAY) AS adjusted_date FROM test_table;
SELECT t.id, value + bit_or(NULLIF(t.value, 0)) AS enhanced_value FROM test_table t GROUP BY t.id HAVING enhanced_value > 10;
